title: Arsystem
compiled_truth: Arsystem is an external contact at [Mailman](companies/mailman). Over the corpus period (2000-10-18 to 2002-03-01), Arsystem sent 1188 and received 37 emails, totalling 1225 interactions. Top correspondents: [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (135), [M  Presto](people/m-presto) (108), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (71), [J  Sturm](people/j-sturm) (68), [M  Love](people/m-love) (67).
timeline:
